title: Backend Developer Vacancy at MakeMyTrip - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at MakeMyTrip - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? MakeMyTrip in Rajkot offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About MakeMyTrip:
MakeMyTrip is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TypeScript

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MakeMyTrip!
